name: Vibe Coding Review
summary: Checks AI-assisted code for scope drift, missing tests, brittle assumptions, and overclaimed outcomes.
safety_notes: Does not execute code by itself.
Requires human review before merge.

name: Systematic Debugging
summary: Guides bug work through reproduction, evidence capture, hypothesis testing, and regression validation.
safety_notes: Avoids speculative fixes.
May require access to logs or test fixtures.

name: Test-Driven Development
summary: Structures implementation around failing tests, minimal code changes, and verified green runs.
safety_notes: Tests must reflect real requirements.
Does not replace product review.

name: Verification Before Completion
summary: Requires fresh command evidence before claiming builds, tests, fixes, or deliverables are complete.
safety_notes: Prevents false completion claims.
Verification commands can still miss untested behavior.

name: Frontend App Builder
summary: Builds polished frontend apps with explicit design systems, responsive behavior, and browser verification.
safety_notes: Visual concepts should not invent unsupported claims.
Browser checks are required for final polish.

name: React Best Practices
summary: Applies React performance and maintainability patterns for component structure, rendering, and bundle size.
safety_notes: Guidance must fit the existing stack.
Optimization should not obscure simple MVP code.

name: Documentation
summary: Creates and maintains README, runbook, architecture, onboarding, and technical reference material.
safety_notes: Docs must separate plans from completed work.
Examples should match real commands.

name: Data Analytics Report Builder
summary: Turns reviewed datasets into structured analytical reports with bounded snapshots and chart blocks.
safety_notes: Input data quality must be checked.
Do not infer missing business facts as confirmed.

name: GitHub Triage
summary: Orients repository, pull request, issue, and branch work while keeping connector state aligned with local git.
safety_notes: Write actions should restate exact targets.
Push and PR creation require a configured remote.

name: OpenAI Docs Lookup
summary: Checks current OpenAI documentation before answering API or product behavior questions.
safety_notes: Use official documentation for API details.
Current behavior can change and should be rechecked.

name: Memory Health Check
summary: Verifies that local or portable memory tooling is available before relying on recalled project facts.
safety_notes: Memory recall may be stale.
Unavailable memory tools should be reported explicitly.

name: Deploy Checklist
summary: Reviews build commands, environment needs, static assets, and release evidence before publishing a site.
safety_notes: Do not claim deployment without a reachable URL.
Secrets and environment variables need explicit handling.

name: Accessibility Review
summary: Checks UI surfaces for keyboard access, contrast, semantic structure, labels, and responsive readability.
safety_notes: Automated checks do not replace manual review.
Contrast must be checked against final colors.

name: Subagent-Driven Development
summary: Splits complex implementation into bounded agent roles for exploration, planning, review, and testing.
safety_notes: Subagents must have bounded tasks.
Final verification still belongs to the coordinating agent.

name: Content Guidelines
summary: Keeps portfolio cards honest by separating active, building, planned, documented, and deployed states.
safety_notes: Avoid inflated metrics.
Unknown links should remain blank or marked pending.
